tasks.title: Create quench-runtime crate and define AST/value model
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/js_runtime/ast.rs, value.rs with Value, Object, ObjectKind, JsError types

tasks.title: Integrate swc parser and lower to runtime AST
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/js_runtime/swc_parse.rs and lower.rs - uses swc_ecma_parser

tasks.title: Implement scope, closures, and interpreter eval loop
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/js_runtime/env.rs and interpreter.rs with Environment, closures, call frames

tasks.title: Add built-ins: Object, Array, JSON, Math, Date, console, Map, Set
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/js_runtime/builtins.rs with full built-in support

tasks.title: Register bridge host functions and Ink globals from the main crate
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/js_runtime/host.rs - registers __ink_call, __ink_call_fast, and all bridge functions

tasks.title: Integrate timers and terminal events with the interpreter
tasks.notes: Implemented in src/event_loop.rs using Context for JS execution with timer/mouse/keyboard dispatch

tasks.title: Adapt runtime.js and remove rquickjs from the project
tasks.notes: Modified runtime.js to avoid destructuring (Transform, Provider, useFocus) and rest params (createElement, Fragment)

tasks.title: Run parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: All 65 tests pass (62 unit + 3 parity). Examples simple.js and counter.tsx work.
